ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Team,

This is a reminder that our corporate VPN will undergo routine maintenance on **Friday, 12 May 2026, from 02:00 AM to 04:00 AM UTC**. During this window, the VPN service will be unavailable.

Please plan accordingly and ensure that any critical remote work is completed before the maintenance start time. If you require an alternative secure connection, contact the IT Helpdesk by **Wednesday, 10 May**.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: Your IT Ticket #12345 Requires Immediate Attention
spam.body:
Dear User,

Our records indicate that your IT support ticket **#12345** has been flagged for security review. To complete the verification process and prevent any potential service disruption, please click the link below to confirm your account details:

<URL>

Failure to verify within **48 hours** may result in temporary suspension of your system access.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

IT Support Team
